title: Vanilla Squared
description: The only Vanilla+ modpack you'll ever need!
body:
Vanilla Squared is a somewhat low-weight modpack that makes your game so much better whilst still making an effort into keeping that Mojang-like feel. It makes use of many world-gen mods such as Tectonic, Terralith, Terrestria, Traverse, and more while keeping the game smooth and optimized with mods like ImmediatelyFast, Entity Culling, Noisium, etcetera.

# Features
- Brand new structures.
- 3D skin layers.
- Snow under trees.
- Revamped nether and end.
- New biomes.
- More types of netherite.
- Trims for tools and elytras.
- Smooth animations.
- Dynamic lights.
- Furniture.
- And more!

# FAQ
Q: Is there support for a version other than 1.21?\
A: There most likely will be support for versions after 1.21, but it will likely take a while for the updates to roll in due to the modpack having ~100 mods.

Q: Forge?\
A: plz no

Q: Will this run on my machine?\
A: For the most part, yeah! Even though this modpack has ~100 mods, none of them are too heavyweight.. This, along with the fact that there are a ton of optimizations mods, makes for an experience almost everyone can enjoy no matter their hardware.

Q: Where are the shaders?\
A: I decided not to add native shaders to this. No need to worry though! The modpack still has Iris so you can add your own shaders and customize them however you feel. However, keep in mind that not all the mods here have shader support, which can cause visual bugs and artifacts.
